name: wishly-fullstack
description: Wishly - men's e-commerce website built with React, Node.js, and MongoDB

scripts.install:all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm --prefix server install --legacy-peer-deps && npm --prefix client install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm --prefix client run build
